name: Huolinhe Opencut Coal Industry Corporation Limited of Inner Mongolia
summary: Huolinhe Opencut Coal Industry Corporation Limited of Inner Mongolia, together with its subsidiaries, mines, produces, processes, and sells coal products in China. The company is based in Holingol, China. Huolinhe Opencut Coal Industry Corporation Limited of Inner Mongolia is a subsidiary of SPIC Mengdong Energy Group Co., Ltd.
